docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHANG, XIAOHAI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT C.R. REICHEL ENGINEERING CO., INC. DEFENDANT'S CONTEMPORANEOUS RECORDS INDICATE THE TIME SPENT AND PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF TO THE CONTRARY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $910.30 FILED BY ZHANG, XIAOHAI AS TO DEFENDANT C.R. REICHEL ENGINEERING CO., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-02-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT C.R. REICHEL ENGINEERING CO., INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM KRAMER-SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF XIAO ZHANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REICHEL ENGINEER CO. INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TIM LORIDER, CEO; DEJALMA CROSSLEY, JOURYMAN PLUMBER; MICHAEL VALADADO, CFO. PROOF OF SERVIC ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJUEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY ZHANG, XIAOHAI C.R. REICHEL ENGINEERING CO., INC.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TIM LORIDER, CEO; DEJALMA CROSSLEY, JOURYMAN PLUMBER; MICHAEL VALADADO, CFO FILED BY DEFENDANT C.R. REICHEL ENGINEERING CO., INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, XIAOHAI AS TO DEFENDANT C.R. REICHEL ENGINEERING CO., INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2026 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY ZHANG, XIAOHAI C.R. REICHEL ENGINEERING CO., INC.
